title: AMFB-v1 prediction object (DRAFT — design-only, NOT runtime-loaded)
description: Canonical schema every benchmarked method emits for one case. A method that cannot produce calibrated 4-bucket proportions sets schema_failure=true. This file is documentation for Phase 17A; it is NOT imported by any runtime and NOT a validation_cases manifest file.

schema_failure.description: true if the method cannot emit calibrated 4-bucket proportions (e.g. qualitative-only validation tools); the four buckets are then ignored and only qualitative/operational metrics apply

x_bucket_sum_rule: If schema_failure=false, the four buckets must sum to 100 within a fixed tolerance (e.g. +/-1.5pp). The harness internally renormalizes to a probability distribution summing to 1 for strictly-proper scoring (Brier/log/CRPS).

x_benchmark_record_v1.description: DRAFT wrapper a future harness (Phase 17B+) would record per (case, method). Design-only.

fields.method: string — e.g. assembly | gpt-5.5 | claude-fable-5 | gemini-3.5-flash | ensemble_of_flagships | survey:prolific | panel:human | naive:uniform25 | naive:always_zero_buyer
fields.method_class: assembly | llm_baseline | validation_tool | survey_platform | human_panel | naive_baseline
fields.model_id_or_version: string — exact snapshot/version string (re-verify at run time)
fields.evidence_pack_hash: sha256 of the FROZEN shared evidence pack (identical across methods)
fields.input_bundle_hash: sha256 over {prompt + evidence_pack + model_id/snapshot + decoding params/seed}
fields.prediction_hash: sha256 over the canonical (RFC 8785 JCS / sorted-key) prediction bytes
fields.locked_at: ISO-8601 UTC, strictly BEFORE the outcome is knowable
fields.search_assisted: boolean — if true, all source timestamps must predate locked_at
fields.observed: null until the outcome resolves; populated ONLY post-outcome by the scoring phase, never by the locking phase

x_isolation_note: This is a Phase 17A DESIGN DRAFT. It is NOT loaded by assembly.validation_ledger (which is manifest-driven over validation_cases/), NOT a model input, and changes no forecast. The real benchmark harness arrives in Phase 17B+ under explicit cost approval.
